note_on_data: Reconstructed retro. 2nd product-loop run. UAT (Gate F) pending user live-test of the overlay.

architecture.note: pause ADR: mic native, system-audio drop-buffers, freeze-aware elapsed

design.note: ux-designer brief; AA contrast on Stop label FLAGGED but shipped (deferred) → user required fix

build.note: failed first (CaptureModeChip private); L3 auto-regen + L4 SIGN-CHECK both FIRED ✓

qa.note: qa-editor caught P1 (stop-while-paused silent) + 3 P2; all fixed

defects.title: Stop-while-paused leaves actor isPaused=true → next recording silently blank
Stale AVAudioRecorder after stop → racing setPaused corrupts file
didMoveNotification observer added per panel, never removed
Panel resize had no screen clamp
White Stop label on #FF4444 = 3.41:1 (fails AA)
defects.root_cause: indicator color reused as button fill; AA finding deferred not blocked

notes: HEADLINE: all 3 run-1 promoted guards fired/held — zero recurrence of signing/xcodegen/destructive-intent. Escapes were NEW classes (pause-state lifecycle, button-fill contrast). Escape rate 0.25→0.20 (improving). Tools: python WCAG calc (5.38:1 verified), codesign -dvvv. L6 honored (numeric contrast, not eyeballed).
